title: 3 Energy Stocks That Just Have No More Hope Left
text: In early April, prominent Wall St analysts predicted that oil prices could go beyond $100 per barrel as OPEC+ cut output while demand was supposed to surge due to China's reopening. However, this prediction has failed to come to fruition, as oil prices have barely budged beyond $70 a barrel, down from over $80 in April.

title: 4 U.S. Upstream Stocks With Potential Despite Industry Headwinds
text: While the Zacks Oil and Gas - US E&P industry has certainly taken some punishment due to the low-price environment, companies like LNG, APA, NOG and EPM should still appeal to investors willing to be patient.

title: 7 Oil Stocks to Sell as Demand Peaks and Interest in EVs Grows
text: With oil prices hovering around $70 and some analysts believing they could go as high as $100. Therefore, it may seem like a waste of time to think about high-risk oil stocks.

title: Markets Fall at Midday, Pulled Lower by Energy Stocks
text: Markets opened the shortened trading week on Tuesday, June 20, 2023 with losses as oil stocks sank along with the price of crude.

title: APA Corporation Announces Appointment of Scott Grandt as Senior Vice President, Corporate Development
text: HOUSTON, June 14, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- APA Corporation (Nasdaq:APA) today announced Scott Grandt has been named senior vice president, Corporate Development; effective June 12.

title: Deep Value Moments
text: One month ago, I was privileged to speak at the London Value Investor Conference (LVIC). Fortunately for us, Ben Inker, co-head of asset allocation at Grantham Mayo Van Otterloo (GMO), kicked off the session with a presentation arguing that deep-value stocks were historically attractive relative to all forms of growth stocks, and very compelling versus quality value stocks.

title: Apache Corporation Tree Grant Program Opens Applications for 2023-2024 Planting Season
text: HOUSTON, June 13, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Apache Corporation, a subsidiary of APA Corporation (Nasdaq: APA), today announced the opening of the Apache Corporation Tree Grant Program application for the 2023-2024 planting season.

title: APA's Unit Ceases Drilling & Cuts Jobs in UK Due to High Taxes
text: APA's subsidiary Apache suspends drilling operations at North Sea offshore UK. It is also reducing British workforce as a move to combat high windfall taxes.

title: 3 High-Risk Oil Stocks to Sell in June Before They Crash and Burn
text: When it comes to investing in the oil sector, it's crucial to assess the market landscape. Sometimes, selling oil stocks may be prudent, especially when dealing with high-risk and potentially overvalued options.

title: US Equities Mixed at Midday as Energy Stocks Gain
text: U.S. equities were mixed at midday on Wednesday, June 7, 2023, as tech and communication stocks weighed on the major indexes.
